ati(tī)sārin m. [atyaṃtaṃ sārayati malaṃ] The disease called atisāra.
— a.,
— atisārakin [atisāro yasyāsti, ini kuk ca] Affected by, afflicted with, dysentery; sātisāro'tisārakī  Ak.
